Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or, In The Alternative, Stay The Action Pursuant To C.C.P. 410.30
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DEBORAH J. WILSON of McInerney & Dillon, PC, Tel No. (510) 465-7100 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. NICK M. CAMPBELL of Builders Law Group, Tel No. (818) 381-5716 appearing telephonically for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MORRISON PUMP COMPANY, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Or, In The Alternative, Stay The Action Pursuant To C.C.P. 410.30 is denied. The declaration of Robert Valentine, Jr. provides that Plaintiff never received a copy of Defendant's terms and conditions. There was no meeting of the minds regarding the forum selection clause and it would be unreasonable to enforce a forum selection clause where Plaintiff had no knowledge of it. Defendant shall respond to the Complaint within 20 days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)
